title: Quantum Noise: Understanding Errors in Quantum Systems
description: Learn about the fundamental sources of quantum noise and how environmental interactions corrupt quantum information, forming the foundation for error correction.
learningObjectives: Identify the main sources of quantum noise in physical systems
Explain how environmental interactions cause decoherence
Distinguish between different types of quantum errors
Model quantum noise using density matrix formalism
Quantify the impact of noise on quantum computations
